name: akm_list_deals
description: List deals from AKM CRM with optional filters.
description_for_agent: List deals from AKM Advisor CRM. Parameters: status (string, optional — filter by pipeline status/stage), search (string, optional — search by name/company), limit (integer, optional, default 50), page (integer, optional, default 1). Returns deals with value, stage, assigned user, and contact info.
